seo.title: Carpenter WE TRUST | Expert Carpentry Services in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Trusted carpentry in Dallas, TX. Custom furniture, cabinetry, trim & more. Free estimates. Call (817) 951-4573.

hero.headline: Crafting Quality Woodwork for Your Home
hero.subheadline: From custom furniture to intricate trim, we bring precision and passion to every project.

featureSections.title: Bespoke Furniture & Cabinetry
featureSections.body: We design and build custom pieces that fit your space and style perfectly. Every joint is handcrafted with care.
featureSections.cardBody: See how we transformed a Dallas living room with a custom entertainment center.

featureSections.title: Expert Trim & Molding Installation
featureSections.body: Enhance your home's character with flawless crown molding, baseboards, and wainscoting.
featureSections.cardBody: The trim work transformed our old house into a showpiece. Incredible attention to detail.

whyChooseUs.title: Master Craftsmanship
whyChooseUs.description: Every cut, joint, and finish is executed with years of skill and an eye for perfection.

whyChooseUs.title: Reliable & Punctual
whyChooseUs.description: We show up on time and complete projects within the agreed timeline, no excuses.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees. You'll know the cost upfront, and we stick to it.

whyChooseUs.title: Fully Insured
whyChooseUs.description: Your home and peace of mind are protected. We carry full liability insurance.

testimonials.quote: They built custom bookshelves that fit our odd alcove perfectly. The craftsmanship is outstanding.
testimonials.author: Linda M.

testimonials.quote: Professional from start to finish. The team was courteous, clean, and the work exceeded our expectations.
testimonials.author: James R.

testimonials.quote: We hired them for full kitchen cabinet replacement. The quality is superb and the project finished ahead of schedule.
testimonials.author: Patricia L.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free, no-obligation estimate.

servicesPage.intro: From small repairs to full renovations, our carpentry services cover every need. We combine traditional woodworking techniques with modern tools to deliver exceptional results.

services.title: Custom Furniture
services.shortDescription: Handcrafted tables, chairs, beds, and more built to your specifications.
services.longDescription: Our custom furniture service brings your vision to life. Whether you need a dining table that seats twelve or a unique bed frame, we use select hardwoods and time-honored joinery techniques.
benefits: Unique design tailored to your space
Choice of wood species and finish

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your needs, style preferences, and budget.

process.title: Design & Approval
process.description: We create detailed drawings and get your sign-off.

process.title: Build & Install
process.description: We craft the piece and deliver it to your home.

faqs.question: How long does custom furniture take?
Can you match existing furniture?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can match stain colors and styles to blend with your current decor.

services.title: Cabinetry & Storage
services.shortDescription: Kitchen cabinets, built-in shelving, and custom storage solutions.
services.longDescription: Maximize your space with custom cabinets and storage. We design and install kitchen cabinets, bathroom vanities, built-in bookcases, and closet systems that combine beauty with functionality.

process.title: Measure & Plan
process.description: We take precise measurements and design the layout.

process.title: Fabrication
process.description: Cabinets are built in our shop to exact specifications.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Professional installers ensure a perfect fit and finish.

faqs.question: Do you offer refacing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can reface existing cabinets to give them a fresh look at a lower cost.

faqs.question: What materials do you use?
faqs.answer: We use premium plywood and solid wood doors. Particle board is not an option.

services.title: Trim & Molding
services.shortDescription: Crown molding, baseboards, wainscoting, and decorative trim.
services.longDescription: Add elegance and value to your home with expertly installed trim. We handle everything from simple baseboard replacement to elaborate crown molding and wainscoting designs.

process.title: Design Selection
process.description: We help you choose profiles that complement your home.

process.title: Precision Cutting
process.description: Each piece is cut with accuracy for seamless corners.

process.title: Installation & Finish
process.description: We install and caulk for a polished look.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate any profile or style.

faqs.question: How long does trim installation take?

services.title: Repairs & Restoration
services.shortDescription: Fix damaged woodwork, doors, windows, and restore old pieces.
services.longDescription: Bring your woodwork back to life. Whether it's a rotting window frame, a sticking door, or an antique piece needing restoration, our craftsmen have the skills to repair and restore.
benefits: Extends the life of your woodwork

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We inspect the damage and provide a repair plan.

process.title: Repair Work
process.description: We replace rotted sections, reglue joints, or refinish surfaces.

process.title: Finish & Protect
process.description: We apply appropriate sealants or paint to match.

faqs.question: Can you repair water-damaged cabinets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can often replace damaged sections without full replacement.

faqs.question: Do you restore antique furniture?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We handle period pieces with care to preserve value.

about.headline: Built on Trust and Skill
about.mission: To provide Dallas homeowners with exceptional carpentry that combines traditional craftsmanship with modern reliability.
story: Carpenter WE TRUST was founded on the belief that quality woodwork should be accessible to every homeowner. Our founder, a third-generation carpenter, started the business with a single saw and a commitment to doing things right. Over the years, we've grown into a team of skilled artisans who share a passion for wood and a dedication to customer satisfaction.

We serve the Dallas area with pride, treating every home as if it were our own. From custom furniture to intricate trim, we bring precision and care to every project. Our reputation is built on the trust of our clients, and we work hard to earn it every day.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We are honest in our pricing, timeline, and communication.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We never cut corners. Every project meets our high standards.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and your time with respect.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in our work and continuously improve our skills.

contact.headline: Let's Discuss Your Project
contact.subheadline: We'd love to hear about your carpentry needs.
